name: Fruity French Toast
directions: Blend apple juice, fruit, and cinnamon in blender.
Coat 2 large nonstick pans with cooking spray or a light coating of oil, and heat over medium.
Dip bread briefly in the fruit mixture until just coated, (do not oversoak), and add 3 slices per pan.
Cook on both sides until just beginning to brown, turning it over two or three times on each side to minimize sticking.
Serve with maple syrup.

name: Peanut Butter Banana Wrap
directions: Spread peanut butter on the tortilla.
Slice banana into thin pieces.
Place banana pieces onto half of the tortilla, on top of the peanut butter. Don't try to over fill the tortilla!
If the banana is too big, just eat the extra slices.
Fold the tortilla in half, to cover the banana slices.
Microwave 20-30 seconds.

name: Breakfast Banana Split
directions: Select smaller, ripe bananas. Cut off one inch, and then slice the banana in half and place on a salad plate curving away from one another and outward. Slice the small piece and place on either side of the curved pieces.
Spoon whipped yogurt across the top of bananas. Dribble slightly diluted jam on top of yogurt. Sprinkle nuts on top, if desired. Offer chocolate or fudge sauce. Enjoy!

name: Peanut Butter Banana Roll
directions: Combine the cereal, wheat germ, and pumpkin pie spice in smal bowl.
Spread peanut butter and honey on banana.
Roll banana in the cereal, wheat germ, spice mixture.
Refrigerate, or serve immediately.

name: Super Deluxe Peanut Butter Sandwich
directions: Place bread under broiler to that one side toasts.
Spread peanut butter on the toasted side of one slice, and spread creamed honey on the toasted side of the other slice.
Place banana slices on the peanut butter slice.
Press together to make a sandwich (the untoasted sides should be out).
Toast in a toaster oven or on a hot skillet until the out-facing sides are nice and crispy.
Dig in!

name: Peanut Butter Banana Breakfast
directions: Pop the bread into the toaster.
Fry the banana in a pan on med-hi heat until it's a mushy paste, about five minutes.
When the toast is done, spread peanut butter on one piece, the banana mush on the other, stick together and enjoy!

name: Power Sandwich
directions: Spread the peanut butter on one slice of bread.
Spread the honey on the other slice.
Cut the banana into 1/4-inch rounds.
Layer the banana slices onto the peanut butter.
Place the other slice of bread, honey-side down against the bananas.
Slice the sandwich in half.
Enjoy!

name: Banana Honey Toast
directions: Toast two slices of whole grain bread.
If desired, spread one tablespoon butter on each slice of toast.
Spread one tablespoon honey on each slice of toast.
Cut one medium ripe banana into even slices; layer the banana slices over each piece of toast.
Sprinkle toast with ground cinnamon to taste.
Enjoy, perhaps with a mug of hot green tea.
